items.title: 'Just ridiculous': Still furious over Olympics, Brad Jacobs faces Oskar Eriksson in 1st rematch at Rock League
LG Energy Solution flags 1st quarter operating loss on weak EV demand
items.summary_auto: LGES, which supplies Tesla, General ​Motors and Hyundai Motor among others, has been grappling with weaker EV battery demand, with one of its ​major customers, GM, idling a Detroit EV plant until ⁠April .

items.title: Rapper Offset in hospital after shooting in Florida
items.summary_auto: The rapper Offset was shot Monday and is stable, according to a spokesperson, but his exact condition is unknown.

items.title: Gunman near Israeli Consulate in Istanbul killed, Turkish governor says
items.summary_auto: Three assailants opened fire at police outside a building housing the Israeli Consulate in Istanbul on Tuesday, sparking a gunfight that left one attacker dead, Turkish officials said. The two other assailants were captured with injuries.

items.title: Federal Ghost Gear Fund to return, bringing hope to some organizations in the Maritimes
items.summary_auto: ​A federal fund for organizations that do marine and beach cleanups is returning, but with less money behind it than in past years.

items.title: U.S., Israel launch strikes across Iran, including energy hub Kharg Island
items.summary_auto: Iran showed no sign of agreeing to U.S. President Donald Trump's ultimatum to open the Strait of Hormuz by the end of Tuesday or face bombing of civilian infrastructure in what would be the biggest escalation yet of the war.

items.title: Psychedelics helped him deal with terminal illness anxiety, but getting them was a long, strange trip
items.summary_auto: Five years after Pete Pearson, 75, was diagnosed with a terminal lung condition, he was experiencing debilitating anxiety and depression known as "end-of-life distress." He wanted to try psilocybin — commonly known as magic mushrooms — to see if it helped. After a lengthy and futile attempt to gain access to the drug legally through Health Canada, Pearson decided this was a trip he needed to take no matter what.

items.title: Still have to file your taxes? Here's how to find yourself some money
items.summary_auto: Tick, tick, tick. This year's tax deadline is coming quick. Here's what tax experts who spoke with CBC News say you should keep in mind as you're filling out your return so you don't miss out on opportunities to find and save money.

items.title: How Canadian military members violated intelligence-gathering rules during COVID-19
items.summary_auto: Canadian Armed Forces members used their own personal social media accounts, computers and networks at home during the COVID-19 pandemic and gathered information about Canadians, violating intelligence-gathering rules, according to a newly released report.

items.title: Watchdog's report on controversial RCMP unit delayed due to lack of chairperson
items.summary_auto: A years-long investigation into a special RCMP unit that polices protests against resource extraction in British Columbia is finished but can’t be finalized because the RCMP's oversight body has been without a chairperson for more than a year.

items.title: The Ambassador Bridge has lost its spot as the busiest U.S.-Canada trade corridor
items.summary_auto: High tolls at Windsor's Ambassador Bridge are pushing commercial truck traffic north to Sarnia, where the Blue Water Bridge has become the busiest crossing on the Canada-U.S. border. The shift comes as the delayed, overbudget Gordie Howe bridge opening remains in limbo.

items.title: Vancouver-based mining company confirms the deaths of 9 of 10 workers kidnapped in Mexico
items.summary_auto: Vancouver-based Vizsla Silver has confirmed the deaths of nine of ‌its 10 workers who were abducted in Concordia, in the ​Mexican state of Sinaloa, ​in late January.

items.title: Dodgers belt five homers in 14-2 rout of Blue Jays in World Series rematch
items.summary_auto: Teoscar Hernandez, Freddie Freeman, Dalton Rushing — with a pair — and Shohei Ohtani hit home runs to power the Los Angeles Dodgers to a 14-2 rout of the Toronto Blue Jays on Monday night at Rogers Centre.

items.title: 2 fighting bald eagles freed from power line in Surrey, B.C.
items.summary_auto: A pair of bald eagles found themselves in a tangle in Surrey, B.C., before power and fire crews helped a local wildlife rehabilitation group free the birds.

items.title: Ukrainians mark the arrival of spring by releasing bats into the air, rescued from war
items.summary_auto: Over the weekend more than 1,000 spectators gathered in Ukraine to carefully open cloth bags and release dozens of rescued bats into the air. Alona Pryslutska, co-founder of the Ukrainian Bat Rehab Center, tells As It Happens guest host Dave Seglins not even the war is stopping this unconventional marker of the arrival of Spring.

items.title: Winnipeg woman slams bank's decision not to refund her after 'dumbfounding' scam
items.summary_auto: A Winnipeg woman who lost thousands after scammers got into her bank account almost two months ago says she's "absolutely shocked" her bank's fraud department denied her appeals to refund her — disbelief she said comes in part because of how clearly fraudulent some of the transactions the bank allowed were.

items.title: Taking the temperature in Terrebonne, Que., as advance voting wraps up in federal byelection
items.summary_auto: Monday marked the last day of advance voting in the Terrebonne, Que., byelection that, along with two more in Toronto, could result in a federal majority government.

items.title: Charge head coach Carla MacLeod stepping away to focus on cancer treatment
items.summary_auto: MacLeod, who announced last November that she'd been diagnosed with breast cancer, will be leaving the team for an undetermined length of time as she continues her treatments, the PWHL club said Monday.

items.title: Ahead of World Cup, ICE says its agents don't carry guns in Canada
items.summary_auto:
U.S. Immigration and Customs Enforcement says its
agents in Canada don't carry firearms, following questions about a
potential ICE presence at upcoming FIFA World Cup games.
